summary: Iteration 64 - Licensee Bug Fixes Verification. All 4 main issues verified: 1) Balance Accumulation - PASS (balance correctly accumulates day-over-day when manager traded), 2) LOT Size Hidden - PASS (LOT Size card and column hidden in Profit Tracker for licensees), 3) Total Profit Card - PASS (shows current_amount - starting_amount = $399 for Ryan TEST), 4) Licensee View - PASS (Target Profit shows '--' when manager didn't trade, Manager Traded column visible with toggles).

issues: When simulating licensee view, the admin 'Your Stats' section (lines 675-710) still shows LOT Size and Projected Daily. The isLicenseeView check is only applied to the member tabbed interface, not the admin section.
The simulation banner shows 'LOT Size: 0.01' for licensees. This should be hidden since licensees don't trade.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Hide LOT Size in Dashboard admin section when simulating licensee view (add isLicenseeView check to lines 688-701 in DashboardPage.jsx)
OPTIONAL: Hide LOT Size from simulation banner in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx line 1567
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 main issues are correctly fixed in the code
Balance accumulation logic in getDailyProjectionForSelectedMonth (lines 1020-1114) correctly tracks runningBalance and accumulatedProfit
LOT Size card hidden with !isLicensee check at line 1718
LOT Size column hidden in Daily Projection table with !isLicensee check at line 2758
Total Profit calculation in Sidebar.jsx line 91 correctly uses (current_amount - starting_amount)
Manager Traded column shows '--' for Target Profit when manager didn't trade (line 2106)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 licensee bug fixes verified: Issue 1 (Balance Accumulation) - PASS, Issue 2 (LOT Size Hidden) - PASS, Issue 3 (Total Profit Card) - PASS, Issue 4 (Licensee View) - PASS. Backend tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend tests: All visual verifications passed. Minor design issues noted: LOT Size still shows in Dashboard admin section and simulation banner when simulating licensee view - these are optional fixes.

issue_1_balance_accumulation.description: Balance correctly accumulates day-over-day when manager traded
issue_1_balance_accumulation.verification: Daily Projection shows balance increasing: Jan 2 $2,038.38 → Jan 20 $3,010.10

issue_2_lot_size_hidden.description: LOT Size card and column hidden for licensees in Profit Tracker
issue_2_lot_size_hidden.verification: Playwright test confirms 'LOT Size card not found' and 'LOT Size column header not found'

issue_4_licensee_view.description: Target Profit shows '--' when manager didn't trade, Manager Traded column visible
issue_4_licensee_view.verification: Daily Projection shows '--' for Target Profit on days without trades, toggle switches visible
